response.justification: Candidate is massively overqualified for a junior/mid-level role, with 15+ years of experience and Staff/Senior titles. Strong TypeScript, Node.js, React, and architecture background match the stack well, and Berlin location fits on-site requirement. However, seniority mismatch creates real risk of role dissatisfaction, salary expectation gap, and short tenure. Worth a screening call to assess motivation for taking a step down and compensation alignment.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React experience plus AWS CDK and Kubernetes exposure
AI-agent/MCP work aligns with nice-to-have LLM integration skills
concerns: Severely overqualified — Staff/Senior engineer for an entry-level posting
Likely compensation expectations far exceed junior/mid budget
High flight risk; unlikely to stay engaged with junior-scoped work
